title: ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers educational programs to individuals who are seeking to improve employability. Programs include GED tutoring and computer literacy. Also assists clients in attaining job readiness through job application assistance, interview preparation, resume building and locating internship and on the job training (OJT) opportunities. Business development services are offered at no cost to those who wish to start their own business and to existing small business owners who wish to improve business practices. 265 SE Oak Street Suite A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon Email (503) 368-9895 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 368-9895 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: Vary by program. Call for more information. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located one block from Hillsboro Central / SE 3rd Ave Transit Center MAX Blue line, and TriMet bus lines: 46, 47, 48, 57 Services: Adult Basic Education * Hispanic/Latino Community GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CAREER DEVELOPMENT AND SKILLS ASSESSMENT WORKSHOP EMPLOYMENT - JOB SEARCH AND EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO
